scripts.release:gate: npm run lock:verify && npm run guard:mock-surfaces && npm run guard:dashboard-route-shell && npm run guard:evidence-updates && npm run test:email-linkage-smoke && npm run test:assignment-policy-smoke && npm run build
scripts.release:gate:optimizer: npm run test:optimization-runtime-foundation-smoke && npm run test:optimization-persistence-replay-smoke && npm run test:optimizer-release-gate-thresholds-smoke && node scripts/release-gate-optimizer.mjs && npm run build
scripts.release:gate:frontier-complete: npm run test:cap001-cap003-cap007-finance-governance-smoke && npm run test:cap002-backend-explainability-smoke && npm run test:cap004-cap009-financial-controls-smoke && npm run test:cap005-financial-outcomes-smoke && npm run test:cap006-scenario-engine-smoke && npm run test:cap008-partner-rail-readiness-smoke && npm run test:cap010-institutional-readiness-scorecard-smoke && npm run test:q002-q005-optimizer-adapters-shadow-smoke && npm run test:q004-q006-mission-optimizer-proof-smoke && npm run test:q008-optimization-health-dashboard-smoke && npm run test:q009-premium-optimizer-gate-smoke && npm run test:q010-schedule-assignment-entrypoints-smoke && npm run test:q011-quantum-adapter-sdk-docs-smoke && npm run release:gate:optimizer && npm run perf:budget
scripts.release:gate:collab: npm run test:collab-propagation-smoke && npm run test:collab-propagation-consistency && npm run test:collab-propagation-replay-soak && npm run test:collab-propagation-browser-evidence
scripts.release:gate:monetization-collab: npm run release:gate:collab && npm run guard:evidence-updates && npm run test:monetization-entitlement-smoke && npm run test:performance-guardrails-smoke && npm run test:mission-runtime-governance-smoke && npm run test:mission-delegation-lifecycle-smoke && npm run test:mission-approval-watch-smoke && npm run test:mission-memory-layering-smoke && npm run test:mission-now-panel-smoke
scripts.test: node --test tests/nexus-context-firewall.test.mjs tests/nexus-client-route-consistency.test.mjs tests/nexus-brain-golden.test.mjs tests/landing-voice-pipeline-smoke.test.mjs tests/nexus-voice-pipeline-hardening.test.mjs tests/nexus-phone-tools-contract.test.mjs tests/nexus-tools-contract.test.mjs tests/nexus-update-document-contract.test.mjs tests/map-url-embed.test.mjs tests/nexus-map-csp-and-resolve-contract.test.mjs tests/nexus-concierge-playbook-contract.test.mjs tests/concierge-playbook-depth.test.mjs tests/firma-route-contract.test.mjs tests/discord-vercel-proxy-contract.test.mjs tests/user-files-library-contract.test.mjs tests/push-device-routes-contract.test.mjs tests/tts-infrastructure-contract.test.mjs tests/engram-edge-contract.test.mjs tests/hermes-edge-contract.test.mjs tests/dashboard-route-outlet-regression.test.mjs && npx tsx --test tests/nexus-document-intent.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:nexus-task: npx playwright install chromium && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} npx playwright test e2e/nexus-login-create-task.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:nexus-signed-in-smoke: npx playwright install chromium && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} CI=true npx playwright test e2e/nexus-signed-in-profile-and-calendar.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:nexus-app-ai-parity-deep: npx playwright install chromium && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} CI=true npx playwright test e2e/nexus-app-ai-parity-deep.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:nexus-voice-immersive-prod: npx playwright install chromium && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} CI=true npx playwright test e2e/nexus-voice-immersive-prod.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:app-ai-composer: CI=true npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && npx playwright test e2e/app-ai-composer-ui.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:voice-visual: npx playwright install chromium && CI= PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} npx playwright test e2e/app-ai-voice-immersive-visual.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:dashboard-nav: CI=true npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && CI=true npx playwright test e2e/dashboard-nav.spec.ts e2e/dashboard-nav-legacy-redirect.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:dashboard-nav:prod: npx playwright install chromium && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} CI=true npx playwright test e2e/dashboard-nav.spec.ts e2e/dashboard-nav-legacy-redirect.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:dashboard-health: CI=true npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && CI=true E2E_PREVIEW_PORT=4177 npx playwright test e2e/dashboard-page-health.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:dashboard-health:prod: npx playwright install chromium && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=${PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL:-https://www.syncscript.app} CI=true npx playwright test e2e/dashboard-page-health.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:landing-capabilities: CI=true npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && npx playwright test e2e/landing-nexus-capabilities.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.verify:platform:full: npm run verify:unified-platform && npm run test:e2e:landing-capabilities && npm run verify:aasa
scripts.verify:ios:build: cd ios/App && xcodebuild -scheme App -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
scripts.verify:engram:edge-live: bash -c 'export ENGRAM_LIVE_USE_DEFAULT_PROJECT_URL=1; if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env scripts/verify-engram-edge-live.mjs; else node scripts/verify-engram-edge-live.mjs; fi'
scripts.release:gate:engram: npm run verify:engram:contract && npm test && CI=true npm run build && ENGRAM_LIVE_ALLOW_NOT_DEPLOYED=1 npm run verify:engram:edge-live
scripts.release:gate:engram:strict: npm run verify:engram:contract && npm test && CI=true npm run build && npm run verify:engram:edge-live
scripts.bringup:hermes:target: bash -c 'test -n "${HERMES_BASE_URL_TARGET:-}" || { echo "Set HERMES_BASE_URL_TARGET=https://… (stable executor URL)"; exit 1; }; exec bash ./scripts/bringup-hermes-tunnel-supabase.sh'
scripts.openclaw:gateway: bash -c 'exec env NVIDIA_API_KEY="${NVIDIA_API_KEY:-placeholder}" openclaw gateway run --port 18789 --force --bind loopback'
scripts.oracle:env:copy-example: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='deploy/oracle/env.local';if(fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('deploy/oracle/env.local already exists — edit it or remove to recopy');process.exit(0);}fs.copyFileSync('deploy/oracle/env.local.example',p);console.log('Created deploy/oracle/env.local — fill OCIDs, fingerprint, OCI_KEY_FILE, then: npm run oracle:config:generate');"
